source_old_req: The integrated component temp_control must assume that the input temperatures temp1 and temp2, provided by sensor 1 and sensor 2 respectively, are within the valid range of 0 to 20 degrees Celsius to ensure the mathematical correctness of the voter and controller logic.
natural_requirement: The temp_control component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for temp_control.i. In the implementation layer, temp_control.i shall route signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through c0 and signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through c1.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through connection c0.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c0 from temp1 to voter.tempin1.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through connection c1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c1 from temp2 to voter.tempin2.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c0 from temp1 to voter.tempin1. The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c1 from temp2 to voter.tempin2.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through connection c0. The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through connection c1.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
